div.p: —Truman reported at the Twelfth Plenary Meeting (see post, page 575) “that the President of the Polish Provisional Government and members of the Polish Delegation had called on him this morning and he had informed them of the action which the Conference had taken with respect to Poland.” No other United States record of this conversation has been found. For Mikołajczyk’s minutes of the conversation, see document No. 1394, post.
